_meta.note: Fees NZD incl GST, scraped from each council's own page. Re-verify every 1 July (see data/dog-registration-fees.md). 'onTime' = paid by the council's cutoff; 'late' = penalty fee; 'afterDue' = middle tier where a council has one.

councils.name: Ashburton District

categories.label: Responsible dog owner (urban only)
categories.note: Late = on-time + $56 urban late-registration penalty (computed). RDO status must be approved before 30 April.

categories.label: Urban de-sexed dog
categories.note: Late = $80 + $38 late penalty. Reduction only given at start of year on receipt of a vet certificate.

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees from the official Fees & Charges Schedule '11.0 Animal Control 26-27' PDF (header '1 July 2026 – 30 June 2027'). Late fees are FLAT ADD-ONS, not percentages: urban +$56, urban de-sexed +$38, rural +$38. Rural rates (Rural A/B/C zones only): 1st & 2nd dog $80 each, subsequent $38. Urban is the fallback 'standard'. Dangerous urban $181 (late $181+$56=$237); menacing urban $120. Licence to keep 3+ urban dogs $65.

councils.name: Auckland

extras.label: SuperGold Community Services combo card holder

councils.notes: All fees include the $2.50 National Dog Database levy.

councils.name: Buller District
councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Late = +50% from 1 August. SuperGold cardholders get 20% off (not applied above). Dogs moving into the district mid-year register free for the remainder.

councils.name: Carterton District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Free by law. (Carterton's page charges certified seeing-eye/hearing dogs 50% of the stated fee, not free; the statutory disability-assist exemption is applied here.)

councils.notes: 2026/27 schedule (page last updated 15 Jun 2026). Rural owner $77 (1st/2nd dog), $42 subsequent. Owners over 65 (urban) pay $75 on-time / $112.50 late. 50% late penalty for all dogs not registered by 1 August. Dangerous-dog late computed at +50%.

councils.name: Central Hawke's Bay District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Free by law (CHB classes them within the working-dog definition).

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (page states 'apply for July 1 2026 - June 30 2027'). Rural pet dog $65 — not shown as a category (no rural toggle). SuperGold (Gold Card) and Responsible Dog Owner reduced fees exist but exact dollar figures are NOT published online ('no change'). After 1 August a penalty of up to 50% of the registration fee per dog applies (late figures computed from the stated up-to-50%).

councils.name: Central Otago District

categories.label: Working dog
categories.note: Council does not publish a late-payment penalty %, so the late fee equals the on-time fee here.

categories.label: Non-working dog (pet)
categories.note: Council does not publish a late-payment penalty %, so the late fee equals the on-time fee here.

councils.notes: Page header reads 'Dog Registration for 2026-2027'. Only two classes: Non-working (pet) $72, Working dog $12 — no desexed or responsible-owner discount. Pro-rata scale reduces $6/month (working $1/month) from August. Re-register each July; deadline 31 July. Unregistered-dog infringement $300. The page does not publish a late-payment penalty percentage, so late = on-time here (conservative).

councils.name: Chatham Islands

categories.label: Standard dog registration
categories.note: $50 early registration (on-time); $78 standard once the early discount is removed.

councils.notes: Figures from the Chatham Islands Council animal control page (cic.govt.nz). The page states no registration year; per the Dog Control Policy 2022, dogs must be registered by 30 June for the ensuing year, so applied to 2026/27. Only two amounts are published online ($50 early, $78 standard). Policy says a lower working-dog rate and a dangerous-dog rate (+50%) exist but no dollar figures are published.

councils.name: Christchurch City
councils.notes: Re-checked 2026-06-30: page still shows 2025/2026 schedule (2026/27 not yet published). Fee reduces pro-rata each month if first registered partway through the year.

councils.name: Clutha District
councils.notes: 2026/27 figures from the council's official Proposed Fees & Charges schedule (S3-hosted PDF; header '1 July 2026 to 30 June 2027'). Council web pages were WAF-blocked. Rural non-working dog is $76/$114. Dangerous dog = base +50% (urban base shown). Late = +50% penalty after 1 August. No desexed discount.

councils.name: Dunedin City

categories.label: Working dog (1st)
categories.note: 1st working dog. 2nd and subsequent working dogs $32 on-time / $48 late.

categories.label: Neutered non-working dog
categories.note: Non-working July rate $117 (= $127 less $10 neutering rebate). Late = $117 + $63.50 fixed penalty (50% of full fee).

councils.notes: Full 2026/27 schedule published (table header '2026/27 fees (GST Inclusive)'; pro-rata heading '1 July 2026 to 30 June 2027'). Late fee is a fixed 50%-of-full-fee penalty added on top (non-working +$63.50, working 1st +$31, RDO +$35, dangerous +$95.25), so late = onTime + that penalty. Responsible Dog Owner status = 44% off; application requires a $49 site visit. Desexed = $10 rebate. Pro-rata monthly scale for mid-year registrations.

councils.name: Far North District

categories.label: Working/pig dog (entire)
categories.note: Desexed working/pig dog is $48 on-time / $72 late.

councils.notes: Source: 'Ngā Utu Fees and Charges 2026/27 FINAL' PDF, Animals/Dogs section. On-time window is 1 July–31 August 2026; full fee + late penalty from 1 September 2026–30 June 2027. Not modelled: 10% Gold Card / Community Services Card discount; sixth dog free when five registered. Dangerous-dog fee $92/$138 quoted from the desexed-dog table. Desexed working $48/$72. No responsible-owner licence scheme.

councils.name: Gisborne District

categories.label: Working dog (rural livelihood)
categories.note: Rural livelihood working dogs; de-sex fee $56 on-time. Capped at first 6 dogs. Late computed from stated 25% rule.

categories.label: Desexed dog (normal urban)
categories.note: De-sex fee column for normal urban dog; requires vet proof. Late computed from 25% rule.

categories.label: Selected owner policy
categories.note: De-sex fee $71 on-time. Late computed from 25% rule.

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees ('Fee if paid by 31.7.26'). Due 1 July; pay by 31 July to avoid a 25% penalty — all 'late' figures computed onTime × 1.25. Two-column table: base vs de-sex fee (de-sexing needs vet proof). Other tiers not mapped: Probationary $166/$150; Superannuitant $74/$67; Selected-owner Superannuitant $63/$57; NZ licensed dog owner $67/$61. Dangerous shown is entire; dangerous de-sex $152.

councils.name: Gore District

categories.label: Working dog
categories.note: Plus $20 if a complaint/impound/infringement in the last two years. Late = +40%.

categories.label: Neutered dog, no complaints (2yr)
categories.note: Non-working $125 less $40 (neutered) less $20 (no complaints/impounds/infringements in two years) = $65.

councils.notes: Page states 'Dog registration costs 2026/2027'. Non-working dog $125; two stacking discounts: neutered/spayed −$40, and no complaints/impounds/infringements in a two-year period −$20 (combined = $65). Working dog $30 (+$20 if complaint/impound/infringement in two years). Late Registration Fee = +40% (late figures computed onTime × 1.4). $300 infringement for an unregistered dog. Page does not state an explicit late cutoff date — dueDate/lateFrom set to the NZ-standard 31 July / 1 August pending confirmation.

councils.name: Grey District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Free by law (Dog Control Act 1996 s.37).

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees from the council's Animal Control fees & charges tab (1 July 2026 – 30 June 2027). Late column ('from 1 August 2026') = +50%; figures are the council's own stated amounts. 20% Gold Card discount available (viewed at renewal). New/newly-acquired dogs charged pro-rata. No urban/rural split, no responsible-owner scheme.

councils.name: Hamilton City
councils.notes: Hamilton classifies by owner Category, not desexed/working. Extra $15 discount for renewing by 30 June; +50% penalty after 31 July.

councils.name: Hastings District

extras.label: Apply to keep more than two dogs

councils.notes: No separate desexed discount in the main schedule.

councils.name: Hauraki District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Free by law (not itemised on page).

categories.label: Responsible Owner Licence (ROL) dog – entire
categories.note: Desexed ROL dog is $70 on-time. Late = loss of ROL, reverts to general entire penalty $217.50.

extras.label: Consent to keep more than two dogs (urban)

councils.notes: Source: Hauraki DC 'Fees for Dogs and Other Animals' page, 'Registration Fees 2026/27' (1 July 2026–30 June 2027). Entire $145/$217.50; Desexed (vet cert) $110/$165; 'Dogs in excess of three' $50/$75 (multi-dog rate, not modelled). ROL: Entire $85, Desexed $70 on-time; missing 31 July disqualifies ROL and the general penalty applies. Penalty = +50%. Disability/guide dogs not itemised — $0 per statutory exemption. ROL applications 1 June–15 July.

councils.name: Horowhenua District
councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (flat annual). A late-registration penalty applies to puppies first registered after nine months; confirm the general late penalty with the council.

councils.name: Hurunui District
councils.notes: 2026/27 fees from the council Fees & Charges > Dogs page. Footnote: 'A 50% increase of the applicable fee will be applied if a registration has not been completed by 1 August 2026' — late = 1.5× (computed). No de-sexed discount. 'Working exempt dog' also $36. Probationary dog owner: working $36, domestic $52. Remission may be granted for a 6th+ dog. Pups mid-year charged pro-rata.

councils.name: Invercargill City
councils.notes: 2026/27 fees from the council's official Annual Plan Fees & Charges 2026-2027 PDF (icc.govt.nz pages WAF-blocked). Late fee = +25% after 1 August (late amounts = base x1.25). Dangerous dog: entire $181.50, desexed $157.50. Menacing dog $151.25. Pro-rata monthly for new registrations.

councils.name: Kaikōura District

categories.label: Working dog
categories.note: NB: Kaikōura charges working dogs MORE than pet dogs ($160 vs $80) — verbatim from the official schedule. Dog control officers may verify working-dog status under the Dog Control Act 1996.

councils.notes: Source: official Fees & Charges 2026-2027 PDF (Animal Control section). Verbatim: Standard $80, Neutered/Spayed $60, Working Dogs $160, Menacing/Dangerous $150, Guide Dogs free, Puppy (≤12 months) $30. Late = 50% penalty if not registered by 30 August 2026 (late from 31 Aug); late figures computed at +50%. Licence to keep more than two dogs in a residential area $40. Note the ō macron in Kaikōura.

councils.name: Kaipara District

categories.label: Working dog
categories.note: Reduced to $41 on-time ($79 late) where 4+ dogs are registered to the same owner.

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Kaipara's on-time deadline is 31 August (late from 1 Sept), unlike most councils' 31 July. Page lists only working/non-working; dangerous/menacing surcharges and multi-dog permits sit in a separate Fees & Charges document not readable for 2026/27. No desexed discount or responsible-owner scheme.

councils.name: Kāpiti Coast District
councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Penalty applies if paid after 5pm, 31 July 2026. Dangerous dog: entire $350/$525 (shown), desexed $200/$300. Owner-over-65 fees equal Approved owner fees.

councils.name: Kawerau District
councils.notes: 2025/26 schedule (2026/27 not yet published as of 2026-06-30; re-check). Late = +50% penalty (computed). Pro-rata monthly schedule applies to puppies/new registrations. No working-dog or responsible-owner rate.

categories.label: Responsible Dog Owner (RDO)
categories.note: Late reverts to standard: $195 neutered / $253 entire.

councils.name: Mackenzie District
councils.notes: 2025/26 schedule read from the council's own Let's Talk fees PDF (mackenzie.govt.nz WAF-blocked; 2026/27 not confirmable — Mackenzie held 2025/26 flat vs 2024/25; re-check). Rural dog $40/$60 — not shown as a category (no rural toggle). Menacing dog $150 (no separate dangerous line). Late = +50% after 1 August. RDO requires a $25 initial inspection.

councils.name: Manawatū District

categories.label: Working dog / selected owner / gold card
categories.note: Single reduced band covers working dogs, selected owners and gold-card holders.

councils.notes: Fees table column explicitly headed '2026/27'. The reduced $47/$62 rate is a single band covering working dogs, selected owners AND gold-card holders (hence workingRate + responsibleOwner both true). Dangerous and Menacing dogs both $206/$304. Discounted fee if paid before 1 August; infringements issued after 31 Aug 2026. (A published schedule does exist, despite earlier 'advised per application' note.)

councils.name: Marlborough District

categories.label: Disability Assist & Police dogs
categories.note: Disability Assist Dogs & Police Dogs — no fee.

categories.label: Category Two (entire / does not meet Category One)

extras.label: Property licence — three or more dogs

councils.notes: 2026/27 published (table headed '1 July 2026 – 30 June 2027'). Category One = non-working dog that is microchipped AND desexed AND not dangerous/menacing with a clean owner record; Category Two = any non-working dog not meeting Category One (standard entire). Not modelled: Old Dog rate $52 ($78 late); 10+ working dogs $13 each additional. Late = annual fee +50% if paid after 31 July 2026.

councils.name: Masterton District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Free by law (not separately listed in schedule).

categories.label: Responsible Dog Owner (RDO) — urban neutered
categories.note: Requires RDO status; separate $30 application. RDO applications close 31 March.

extras.label: Permit to keep more than 2 dogs (urban)

councils.notes: 2026-27 schedule published. Registration due 30 June; a 50% penalty is added 1 August if not paid in full by 31 July, so late = onTime × 1.5. No dedicated working-dog rate; rural rates instead — first rural dog $123.10, 2nd+ rural $35 (notes only). Dangerous dog rate shown is neutered ($184.70). Surrender (prior approval) $350.

councils.name: Matamata-Piako District

categories.label: Full fee less Responsible Owner rebate

councils.notes: From the council's DRAFT 2026/27 fees schedule adopted for consultation (final live page WAF-blocked). Full fee $172 (verbatim). A $30 rebate applies for ONE of: de-sexed dog, working dog, or Dogs NZ registered breeder (so working and desexed both = $142). Separate Responsible Owner rebate $15. Late = +50% penalty (computed). Dangerous dog = 150% of relevant fee (computed).

councils.name: Napier City
councils.notes: 2025/26 schedule (page states 'approved for 1 July 2025 to 30 June 2026'; 2026/27 not yet published as of 2026-06-30; re-check). Due by 1 August; penalty after 1 August. No separate desexed discount.

councils.name: Nelson City
councils.notes: Fee reduces pro-rata each month if first registered after July. 50% penalty after 1 August.

councils.name: New Plymouth District
councils.notes: 2026/27 column read from NPDC's official Schedule of Fees and Charges (PDF covers 1 July 2025 – 30 June 2027). Rural dog $72.70 (first two dogs)/$37.10 (3rd+) — not shown as a category (no rural toggle). Pensioner (65+) select rates: desexed $92.50, entire $121. Late is a TIERED penalty: +25% after 1 August (shown as 'late'), +50% after 1 December. Dangerous dogs pay applicable fee +50% (no fixed figure published).

councils.name: Ōpōtiki District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Certified disability assist dog or dogs kept for specific tasks by Government Agencies. Free.

categories.label: Working dog
categories.note: Includes hunting dogs declared working dogs per Council resolution 23 April 2019.

councils.notes: Live animal-control page states no registration year explicitly; figures are the current published fees as at 2026-07-03 (2026/27 year). On-time (discounted) = paid on or before 3 August; full fee after. Prose also states a 50% penalty for payments not made by 31 July — the fee table's 3 August cutoff is used as the operative boundary.

councils.name: Ōtorohanga District
councils.notes: Page states 'Dog Registration Fees approved for 1 July 2026 to 30 June 2027'. Rural dogs $72/$108 — not shown as a category (no rural toggle). Late = additional 50% if not registered by 1 August (late figures computed). No dangerous-dog dollar figure published.

councils.name: Palmerston North City
councils.notes: Infringement fee for an unregistered dog is $300.

councils.name: Porirua City
councils.notes: Fees from the live Animal Control fees & charges page (no explicit year heading; live-verified 2026-07-03). Late = 50% of the applicable fee (computed). Dangerous dog: entire $331.50 shown (neutered $240); late +50%. Not modelled: approved obedience/agility rate (neutered $123 / entire $196) and reduced registration (neutered $97.50 / entire $160, + $41 application + $80 inspection). Due date confirmed from Porirua dog-registrations page (renew by end of July; 50% penalty if unpaid).

councils.name: Rangitīkei District

categories.label: Working dog (each, up to five dogs)
categories.note: Sixth and additional working dogs $13 each (on-time only).

councils.notes: From the official Fees and Charges 2026/2027 schedule (s37(6) Dog Control Act 1996) plus the council's 4 June 2026 public notice. Payable by 1 August; +50% surcharge on fees not paid before 1 August (produces the 'late' figures). Dangerous dog: de-sexed $165/$247.50, entire $247.50/$371.25 (entire shown).

councils.name: Rotorua Lakes

categories.label: Desexed dog (urban)
categories.note: Urban fee less the $11 desexing rebate.

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Late penalty is a flat add-on ($62.50 urban / $45 rural); $11 rebate for desexed dogs.

councils.name: Ruapehu District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Free by law; not separately listed on Council fee table.

categories.label: Working dog
categories.note: On-time = paid by 30 June. Hunting dogs (pig/deer in conservation estate) separate: $45 / $67.50.

categories.label: Responsible dog owner
categories.note: Single figure $64.50 listed with no early/late split; late computed from stated 50% rule.

councils.notes: Dog Control Fees 2026/27, adopted by Council 13 May 2026. Register by 30 June or a 50% late fee applies (late = base × 1.5, matches published e.g. $129.50 × 1.5 = $194.25). FAQ elsewhere loosely states 'until 31 July' but the fee table is keyed to 30 June. Dangerous dog = 150% of applicable fee (no fixed figure published). Hunting dog rate $45/$67.50.

councils.name: Selwyn District
councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Flat fee; 50% late penalty after 31 July; pro-rata for pups registered mid-year. Confirm any desexed/working discount with the council.

councils.name: South Taranaki District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Seeing, Hearing and Disability Assist dogs exempt from fees.

categories.label: Selected Owner (entire)
categories.note: Selected Owner desexed rate is $97 on-time / $145.50 late.

extras.label: More than 2 Dogs Permit (application per property)

councils.notes: Early Bird fees if paid before 31 July 2026; a 50% penalty is applied to outstanding balances on 1 August 2026, so all 'late' figures are computed on-time × 1.5. Rural rates (notes): first 2 dogs $82/each ($123 late), 3+ $69/each ($103.50 late). No dedicated working-dog rate. No microchip fee published.

councils.name: South Waikato District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Free by law (not itemised on page).

categories.label: Selected owner (urban)
categories.note: Selected Owner Policy rate. Late computed from stated +50% rule (96×1.5=144).

councils.notes: Source: South Waikato DC 'Dog Control and Registration' fees page, table labelled '2026-27'. Standard urban entire $204; desexed $144; Selected Owner (good-owner) $96 urban; rural standard $96 (not modelled). Penalty = 50% if paid after 31 July, so late = onTime × 1.5. Disability/guide dogs $0 per statutory exemption. More-than-two-dogs urban licence $275.

councils.name: South Wairarapa District

extras.label: Permit for more than 2 urban dogs

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (1 July 2026 – 30 June 2027). Rural rates (not shown — no rural toggle): desexed $53/$78, entire $87/$129, dangerous $79/$119; flat fee for up to 10 rural dogs $275/$412. Late = additional 50% after 1 August. No working-dog or responsible-owner discount published.

councils.name: Southland District

categories.label: Service dog (disability assist) with current papers

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees from the council's official Animal Control Fees & Charges PDF. Late = +50% after 1 August. Desexed (-$30) and responsible-owner (-$30) discounts stack to $50. Discount evidence must be provided before 1 May. Dangerous dog = base +50% ($110 x1.5).

councils.name: Stratford District
councils.notes: Page header reads '2026/27 Fees and Charges'. Three owner classes: General (standard, above), Good Dog Owner $131.10/$171.00, and Select Dog Owner (best rate, application-based, = responsibleOwner). Rural rates (notes): first 3 $51.30/$68.40, after 3 $39.90/$51.30. No separate desexed/working rate. Discounted rate if paid before 1 August. Caveat: page's note text still cites stale 2025 dates despite the 2026/27 header.

councils.name: Tararua District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Disability assist dog with organisation certificate — no charge.

categories.label: Working dog
categories.note: First five working dogs full fee; additional at tag fee $7/dog.

categories.label: Preferred owner dog (entire)
categories.note: Preferred owner desexed $76/$114. Also covers Dogs NZ members.

councils.notes: Fees for 1 July 2026 – 30 June 2027, adopted 24 April 2026; GST-incl. Fee if paid on or before 1 August, late after. Rural domestic dog $88/$132 (Dogs NZ member $62/$93); over-65 companion $94/$132. Dangerous dog = applicable base fee +50% (dangerousDog computed from urban entire: 164×1.5=246 on-time, 246×1.5=369 late).

councils.name: Tasman
councils.notes: 2025/26 schedule (2026/27 not yet published on the council's own site as of 2026-06-30; re-check). Fees set by property size, not desexed status: a rural dog (property 1 ha+) is $70/$105. Dangerous dogs charged +50%. Late = +50% after 31 July. Read from the council's official fees document (council web pages WAF-blocked).

councils.name: Taupō District

categories.label: Responsible Owner (entire)
categories.note: Late adds the ~$20 penalty — confirm with council.

categories.label: Desexed dog
categories.note: Entire fee less the $15 desexed discount.

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Late is a flat +$20 after 31 July; $15 discount for desexed dogs.

councils.name: Tauranga City
councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (unchanged from 2025/26). Tauranga charges a single flat fee (no desexed/working/owner discount in the main schedule); on-time fee applies before 1 August.

councils.name: Thames-Coromandel District
councils.notes: Source: TCDC 'Fees and Charges: Animal Control – Dog Control' page (2026/2027 column) + 2026-27 Schedule of Fees PDF. 'All dogs except guide dogs and dangerous dogs' = $110 on-time / $165 after 1 August (penalty = +50% of unpaid regns as at 1 August). No desexed discount, no cheaper working rate — first three working farm dogs pay standard; the fourth and additional are free. Dangerous dogs $165/$247.50. Pro-rata available at officer discretion for mid-year dogs. Microchipping $30.

councils.name: Timaru District
councils.notes: Single annual fee that pro-rates by month for dogs first registered after July; new-puppy registration is always $47. Confirm any late-payment penalty with the council.

extras.label: Permit to keep more than two dogs

councils.name: Waikato District
councils.notes: Waikato classifies by owner type. General owner $120/$140 (standard); Selected owner $60/$80 and Approved owner $95/$115 are good-owner tiers (Selected shown for the responsible-owner toggle); Farm owner $54/$74 shown for working/rural. Submit a desexing certificate for a free registration year (dogs registered within the past 12 months, excludes dangerous/menacing). Page schedule effective 2025-2027.

councils.name: Waimakariri District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: Free by law; also exempt from the per-owner fee.

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (page states 1 July 2026 – 30 June 2027). Waimakariri charges a uniform per-owner fee ($51 on-time / +50% late) PLUS a per-dog fee (entire $60, desexed $32, working $15, dangerous $124). The category amounts above INCLUDE the $51 owner fee (correct for a single-dog owner); the owner fee is charged once regardless of dog count. Late = +50%. No responsible-owner discount.

councils.name: Waimate District

categories.label: Selected owner / working dog / farm pet
categories.note: Same $35 rate covers selected-owner status, working dogs and farm pets. Late = 1.5× (50% penalty).

categories.label: Urban neutered non-working dog or puppy under 12 months

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees verified from the official 'Dog Owners Information Guide 2026/27' PDF (earlier search-snippet hints of $120/$65/$35/150% were confirmed against this source, not used blind). Payment due 1–31 July; '50% penalty will apply to each unpaid registration from 1 August 2026' — late = 1.5× (computed). Dangerous dog = 150% of applicable fee. Selected-owner status available by application. Late registration after 1 Aug charged pro-rata. Failure to microchip = $300 infringement. (An older notice showed stale 2020 figures $100/$60/$30 — not used.)

councils.name: Waipā District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: No fee if re-registered by the due date; standard fees apply after.

councils.notes: From the council's official DRAFT Schedule of Fees and Charges 2025-27 (have-your-say document). Rural dog (full year) is $64/$96 — not shown as a category (no rural toggle). Due 30 June; +50% penalty from 1 August (the 'late' column = standard + 50% penalty). Dangerous dogs pay an additional 50% of the usual fee. Fencing rebate requires a property inspection; neutered rebate requires a vet certificate.

councils.name: Wairoa District
councils.notes: 2025/26 schedule (2026/27 not yet published as of 2026-06-30; re-check). Wairoa's on-time deadline is 31 August (late from 1 Sept). Menacing dog (Class M) $266/$399. No desexed discount.

councils.name: Waitaki District
councils.notes: Flat annual fee. Confirm any late-payment penalty with the council.

councils.name: Waitomo District

extras.label: Consent to keep more than 2 urban dogs

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (confirmed on live site and Annual Plan PDF). Rural dogs $59/$88.50 — not shown as a category (no rural toggle); every 6th of 5 rural dogs free if paid on time. Gold-card urban concession $120/$180. Late = +50%. Dangerous dog = 150% of the otherwise-applicable fee.

councils.name: Wellington City

categories.label: Accredited Dog Owner
categories.note: Late reverts to standard: $222 desexed / $306.50 entire (ADO status lost if not paid by 31 July).

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees (re-verified 2026-06-30). Includes the $2.50 National Dog Database levy. Late fee = 50% of registration if paid after 31 July. No separate dangerous-dog registration fee published. Puppies are charged pro-rata to 30 June.

councils.name: Western Bay of Plenty District

categories.label: Disability assist dog
categories.note: No fee, on application and verification. Same free class covers Police, Ministry, security, Search & Rescue.

categories.label: Working dog
categories.note: Kept solely for herding/driving stock or pest destruction; on application and verification.

councils.notes: 2026/27 published fees. On-time = pay before 4 August 2026; late = on or after 4 August 2026. Matakana Island reduced rate $55 on-time / $82.50 late (island-specific, not mapped). Dangerous figures shown are entire; dangerous desexed $182/$272.

councils.name: Westland District
councils.notes: 2025/26 schedule (2026/27 not yet published as of 2026-06-30; re-check). Late = +50% from 1 August. 20% Gold Card discount on non-working fees. Dangerous dogs +50%.

councils.name: Whakatāne District

categories.label: Assist / disability dog
categories.note: Certified disability assist dogs — no charge.

councils.notes: 2026/27 fees. Discount deadline 1 August 2026; fees increase after. Dangerous-classified dogs pay an additional 50% on top of the above (dangerousDog = entire +50%).

councils.name: Whanganui District
councils.notes: Fees set by council resolution 24 March 2026 for 1 July 2026 – 30 June 2027. Whanganui uses a prompt-payment discount model: 'onTime' = paid by 31 July (with discount); 'late' = the standard base fee (no discount). A separate late-payment PENALTY of 150% of the applicable fee applies to registrations paid on or after 1 September. Discounts: neutered -$27, RDO -$27, first-time -$14.50. Dangerous dog = 150% of $147 entire fee = $220.50.
